---
title: "Software"
---

I develop open-source software in R related to robust statistics and semiparametric regression models.

- **[rplam-vs](https://github.com/alemermartinez/rplam-vs)**: An R package for robust estimation and simultaneous variable selection in partially linear additive models.

- **[rmargint](https://github.com/alemermartinez/rmargint)**: An R package with the classical and robust marginal integration procedures for estimating the additive components in an additive model.
